summary: Updated AC power sleep timeout from 15 minutes to 60 minutes in home.nix dconf settings. Build verification passed. Configuration ready to apply with nixos-rebuild switch.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary with verification steps and configuration details

completion_data.completion_summary: Changed AC power sleep timeout from 15 minutes to 60 minutes in home.nix dconf settings, allowing processes to continue for up to an hour on AC power while screen still blanks after 5 minutes.

next_steps: Run 'sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .' to apply the configuration
